nodes.label: msk3d0ut/claude-skill-ugc-prompt: A Claude skill that generates complete UGC vid
nodes.pitch: UGC ads dominate 2026 Meta/TikTok spend. Brands pay Rs 50K-2L per creator-shot UGC video. With this skill + Higgsfield API key, generate 50 ad variations overnight, A/B test in Meta, iterate creative at a speed no human shop can match. Productize as '30 video ads in 30 days' retainer for D2C brands. Skill is the IP; volume + testing loop is the moat.
nodes.notes: Claude skill: second-by-second UGC video-ad prompts for Higgsfield/Sora 2.

nodes.label: kycloudtech/website-visual-scorer: A Claude Skill for scoring B2B website visual
nodes.pitch: Direct PitchBot upsell. After cold-email, run prospect's site through scorer, attach 1-page audit to the second touch: 'Your site scores 4/10 on CTA hierarchy. Want us to fix it for Rs X?' US CRO consultancies charge $5-20K for exactly this audit. Conversion of B2B outreach goes up because you deliver value before asking for the meeting. CRO retainer is the upsell.
nodes.notes: Claude skill: B2B website conversion scoring across 5 dimensions.

nodes.label: wxtsky/byob: Bring Your Own Browser — let your AI agent use the Chrome you alrea
nodes.pitch:
STRATEGIC UNLOCK. Standard browser-use libraries spin up fresh headless Chrome with no login state. BYOB connects to your real session — Meta Ads Manager, Shopify Admin, HubSpot, Naukri RESDEX, Gmail. With this:
  - ARIA reads RESDEX directly (no API needed)
  - PitchBot posts from your real LinkedIn
  - Set-and-forget Meta Ads Manager agent becomes possible
Pitch: 'Autonomous campaign manager — reads Shopify, manages Meta Ads every night, kills underperformers, scales winners.' 5% of ad spend managed; 20 clients @ Rs 5L/mo avg spend = Rs 50L/mo management fees.
nodes.notes: Bring Your Own Browser — let Claude drive your already-logged-in Chrome.

nodes.label: masteranime/n8n-claude-skills: Production Claude Code skills for n8n from a Veri
nodes.pitch: n8n is the open-source Zapier — 100K+ active instances. Combining n8n's reliable workflow runtime with Claude reasoning gives the missing piece: workflows that adapt instead of break. Self-hosted n8n + Claude skill library + custom MCP servers, sold as managed offering to Indian SMEs who can't afford Zapier ($200/mo) and won't trust US clouds with their data. 100 mid-size clients @ Rs 15K/mo = Rs 1.8 cr ARR with one engineer.
nodes.notes: Production Claude Skills for n8n built from 100+ real workflows.

nodes.label: buluslan/gpt-image2-ecommerce: GPT-Image-2 驱动的电商素材一键生成 Claude Code Skill | E-com
nodes.pitch: 200-SKU Shopify store needs ~1000 ad-ready images/year. Photo studios charge Rs 500-2000 per SKU; this skill produces them at API cost (~Rs 2). Sell as 'Send your product feed, get 1000 ad-ready creatives in 24h' flat-fee retainer. Bundle with Meta Ads Manager handoff for 2x ASP. Margin business with zero auth complexity — fastest path to first revenue.
nodes.notes: Claude skill for D2C product imagery (Shopify-friendly).
